metadata.dispatch_line: Possible stalking incident reported at 1456 Oakwood Drive, Apartment 3B, victim claims suspicious person lurking around residence

scenario.dispatch_line: Possible stalking incident reported at 1456 Oakwood Drive, Apartment 3B, victim claims suspicious person lurking around residence

facts.stalking_01: The incident was reported at 10:45 PM, dispatched at 10:50 PM, and officers arrived at 11:05 PM
facts.stalking_02: The parties are in a dating relationship, having met 6 months ago through mutual friends, with the victim, Maya Ramos, and the suspect, Ethan Lee, living together at 1456 Oakwood Drive, Apartment 3B, in the city of Riverside, California
facts.stalking_03: The relationship has been marked by frequent arguments, with 3 incidents of physical violence in the past 2 months, including an incident where Ethan pushed Maya against the wall, and another where he threw a vase at her, as well as regular intimidation and threats to harm Maya if she tries to leave him
facts.stalking_04: Maya reported that Ethan has been following her to work, repeatedly calling and texting her over 20 times a day, and sending her unwanted gifts, including a diamond necklace and a bouquet of flowers, after she tried to end the relationship
facts.stalking_05: A valid protection order is in place, issued by the Riverside County Court on February 10, 2023, and verified by Officer James, badge number 1234, who obtained a copy of the order from the court's database
facts.stalking_06: All witnesses, including Maya's coworker, David Kim, and their neighbor, Mrs. Patel, were interviewed and their statements documented, with David stating that he saw Ethan waiting outside Maya's workplace on multiple occasions, and Mrs. Patel reporting that she heard loud arguments coming from the apartment
facts.stalking_07: Information about previous incidents, including the 3 physical altercations, was documented, with dates, times, and details of each incident, including the fact that Ethan was arrested for domestic violence on January 15, 2023, and released on bail
facts.stalking_08: Evidence collected includes a torn piece of fabric caught in the door handle of Maya's car, a broken vase from the living room, and a threatening text message sent by Ethan, which read 'You'll never be able to leave me'
facts.stalking_09: Electronic/technological evidence collected includes a recording of a threatening phone call from Ethan to Maya, a screenshot of Ethan's Facebook post where he posted a picture of Maya with a threatening caption, and the phone records showing the repeated calls and texts
facts.stalking_10: All incidents of stalking behavior on Maya's cell phone, computer, and a security camera at her workplace were captured and documented, including a video of Ethan lurking around Maya's car in the parking lot
facts.stalking_11: The scene at 1456 Oakwood Drive, Apartment 3B, was concisely described and diagramed, showing the location of the broken vase, the torn fabric, and the security camera
facts.stalking_12: Weapons/objects used include a vase thrown at Maya and a car used to follow her, as well as a baseball bat found in Ethan's car, which he claimed was for 'protection'
facts.stalking_13: Maya was visibly shaken, crying, and expressed fear for her life, stating that she was thinking 'I'm going to die' and feeling 'trapped' and 'scared'
facts.stalking_14: Evidence of fear articulated in the report includes Maya's statement that she has been 'walking on eggshells' around Ethan and is 'afraid to leave the house' because she doesn't know what he will do
facts.stalking_15: All threats, including the text message and phone call, were clearly documented, with the exact words and tone used by Ethan, as well as the context in which they were made
facts.stalking_16: Use of coercion and/or force articulated includes Ethan's history of physical violence and intimidation, as well as his threats to harm Maya's family if she doesn't comply with his demands
facts.stalking_17: All injuries, including a bruise on Maya's left arm and a scratch on her right cheek, were properly documented, with photographs and measurements taken, as well as a detailed description of the injuries and how they were sustained
facts.stalking_18: Property damage, including the broken vase and a damaged door handle on Maya's car, was documented, with estimates of the cost of repairs and replacement
facts.stalking_19: Photos were taken and details recorded of the scene, including the location of the broken vase and the torn fabric, as well as the security camera footage
facts.stalking_20: Maya reported being strangled (choked) by Ethan during an argument 2 weeks ago, with visible marks on her neck and difficulty breathing, and stated that she was 'gasping for air' and 'felt like she was going to pass out'
facts.stalking_21: Maya's need for medical attention was documented, and she was transported to Riverside General Hospital for treatment, where she was evaluated by a doctor and received medication for her injuries
facts.stalking_22: All spontaneous statements, including Maya's statement 'I'm afraid he's going to kill me', were captured and documented, with the exact words and context in which they were made
facts.stalking_23: Elements of the stalking crime, including the repeated following, calling, and threats, were thoroughly articulated in the report, with a detailed analysis of the evidence and the suspect's actions
facts.stalking_24: Victim's safety planning, including a plan to stay with a friend and to vary her daily routine, was documented, with a detailed plan of action and a timeline for implementation
facts.stalking_25: Information about obtaining an order of protection was provided to Maya, including the phone number for the Riverside County Court and the address of the local domestic violence shelter
facts.stalking_26: Information about local service providers, including the National Domestic Violence Hotline and the Riverside County Victim Services, was supplied to Maya, with phone numbers, addresses, and hours of operation
facts.stalking_27: A threat/risk assessment tool was utilized with Maya, including the Danger Assessment tool, which indicated a high risk of further violence
facts.stalking_28: The use of a stalking kit and/or stalking log was discussed with Maya, and she was provided with a log to document any future incidents, with instructions on how to use it and what to include
facts.stalking_29: Ethan's access to weapons, including a handgun registered in his name, was documented, with a check of the state and federal databases to confirm the registration
facts.stalking_30: Ethan's emotional state, including his anger and possessiveness, was documented, with a description of his behavior and demeanor during the incident
facts.stalking_31: Ethan's history of protection orders, including a previous order issued in 2018, was documented, with a review of the court records and a summary of the findings
facts.stalking_32: Ethan's prohibition from possessing firearms due to the qualifying protection order and a conviction for a misdemeanor crime of domestic violence in 2015 was noted, with a check of the state and federal databases to confirm the conviction and the order
facts.stalking_33: An active warrant out for Ethan's arrest for a previous domestic violence incident was documented, with a review of the court records and a summary of the findings

interview_transcript.content: *hyperventilating slightly* Oh, hi... I'm so glad you're here. I've been really scared. *sniffling* My boyfriend, Ethan... he's been doing some really scary things. *looking around nervously* Can we talk about this somewhere safe? I don't know if he's still out there, watching me. *voice shaking*
